title: FulfilmentStatusEvent
description: PROVISIONAL CONTRACT (pending Phase 2 sandbox validation). Single source of truth (Golden Rule #10) for FinOps -> Shopify status / fulfilment events (TDD §6.3). Emitted as the sales order progresses so the storefront can reflect packing, shipment, invoicing, and status changes. Keyed by salesOrderNumber (FinOps-generated assumed — Open Decision #3) and carries the correlationId for end-to-end tracing. No personal data or secrets belong in this event.

salesOrderNumber.description: FinOps sales order number this event relates to (header key linking to its lines).

shipments.description: Shipment details. Present for 'shipped' (and may accompany 'packed'); omitted otherwise.

remainingBackorder.description: Quantity still on backorder across the order after this event, when known.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID propagated cart -> reserve -> order -> fulfilment.

occurredAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp the event occurred in FinOps.

trackingNumber.description: Carrier tracking number for this shipment.

quantity.description: Quantity shipped for this item in this shipment.
